## Guitar Customization Options

- **Build-to-order guitars:** People search for the company’s ability to build custom guitars from the ground up, combining specific features from different models to create a unique instrument.
- **Neck customization:** Searches often focus on specific neck modifications, such as neck shaving or re-profiling, as well as fitting different neck shapes like super-wide or super-slim.
- **Electronics and parts:** Customers look for information on pickup swaps, rewinds, and other electronic modifications to customize their guitars.

![Haywire-Custom-Guitars-urgent care services in one day!](https://haywirecustomguitars.com/wp-content/uploads/2018/05/Haywire-Custom-Guitars-urgentcare.webp)

Haywire Custom Guitars acoustic and electric guitar repairs and much more…

## Repair and modification services

- **General repairs:** Haywire’s reputation for handling a wide range of guitar repairs, from simple setups to structural fixes like headstock breaks, makes this a popular search.
- **Professional setups:** The company’s “gig-ready” process is a key search point for musicians looking to optimize their instrument for playability and tone.
- **Refinishing and re-topping:** Beyond structural work, customers search for refinishing and re-topping services for their existing guitars.

The most popular search subjects about Haywire Custom Guitars  **customization options** (specifically wiring mods and neck profiles),are their **guitar repair services**, as well as **customer reviews**.

## Customization Options and Unique Features

Customers frequently search for details on the specific modifications and unique features that [Haywire Custom Guitars](https://haywirecustomguitars.com/testimonials-from-our-customers/) offers, particularly regarding playability and sound enhancements.

- **Treble Bleed Volume Mod Circuit**: This modification is mentioned in multiple testimonials as a highly valued feature that allows for no loss of high frequencies when the volume knob is rolled down, which is especially popular for blues and SRV-style players.
- **7-Sound Toggle Switch**: This wiring option, which expands the tonal possibilities of their guitars, is a significant point of interest for customers looking for versatile instruments.
- **Neck Profiles and Playability**: Customers often search for information on neck customization, including neck shaving/thinning, fret leveling, and low action setups, all aimed at maximum comfort and playability. They also offer guitars with various nut widths, including extra-large neck width options and super slim.
- **Ultra-Light Guitars**: Haywire’s process for creating lightweight guitars (dropping the weight by up to 30% by baking the moisture out of the swamp ash bodies) is a popular topic, particularly among older players or those with back issues.

![image: Haywire Custom Guitar showing 7 sound switch location](https://haywirecustomguitars.com/wp-content/uploads/2020/01/Haywire-Custom-Guitars-Daytona-Custom3.jpg)

Haywire Custom Guitar showing 7 sound switch location

## Haywire Custom Shop Repairs and Setups

The company has a strong reputation and high ratings for its repair work and meticulous setups, making this a frequently searched subject.

- **Expert Repair Services**: Reviewers consistently recommend Rick at Haywire for any kind of repair or setup work, from minor adjustments to full modifications.
- **“Gig-Ready” Setup Process**: A key selling point is their “8-point ‘gig ready’ process,” which ensures a guitar is professionally set up and ready for immediate use on stage with low, buzz-free action.

![Standard neck profiles from Warmoth Guitar Products featured in many Haywire Custom Guitars](https://haywirecustomguitars.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/05/guitar-neck-profiles.jpg)

Standard neck profiles from Warmoth Guitar Products featured in many Haywire Custom Guitar necks

## Customer Reviews

Prospective buyers frequently search for reviews and testimonials to verify the quality and customer service offered by Haywire Custom Guitars.

- **Positive Customer Experiences**: Many reviews praise the craftsmanship, quality components from respected manufacturers (like EMG, Lollar, and Seymour Duncan), and the owner’s helpfulness and expertise.
- **Custom Shop Reputation**: Searches often focus on testimonials regarding the custom shop’s ability to build guitars to specific customer requirements and the personalized attention provided during the design process

Customers most appreciate the customization options, high quality craftsmanship, and excellent customer service from Haywire Custom Guitars. They value the ability to create a guitar that meets their specific needs, the well-built and comfortable feel of the instruments, and the helpful, knowledgeable service from owner Rick Mariner.

![image Shaving A Guitar Neck before and after photos](https://haywirecustomguitars.com/wp-content/uploads/2020/08/Haywire-Custom-Guitars-image-guitar-side-by-side-comparison-neck-shave-example-1.jpg)

Shaving A Guitar Neck at Haywire Custom Guitars. Shaving A Guitar Neck before and after photos.

- **High-quality craftsmanship:** Many customers find the guitars are well-built, with great craftsmanship and components, often comparing them favorably to higher-end models. This includes attention to detail in areas like frets and alignment.
- **Customization**: The shop specializes in building guitars to customer specifications, combining desired elements from different guitars to create a unique instrument.
- **Excellent customer service**: Owner Rick Mariner is frequently praised for his expertise, communication, and passion for the craft. He is known for working closely with customers to achieve their desired outcome.
- **Play-ability and tone**: Customers report that the guitars are comfortable to play for extended periods, have great tone, and excellent sustain. The exclusive “Gig-Ready” process helps ensure the guitar feels and sounds great right away.
- **Repair services**: In addition to custom builds, Haywire Custom Guitars is highly recommended for repairs and setups, with many customers praising the quality of work for both custom and repair jobs.

## Guitar Shop Services

# Guitar Repair & Services

#### We bring out the best feel and sound in any electric guitar, bass guitar, acoustic guitar, mandolin, banjo, dulcimer, and classic vintage guitars!

### Your Local Guitar Repair Shop in Kennesaw

If you need guitar repair, setup, maintenance or mods in Atlanta we are a convenient guitar shop. Located in Kennesaw, we're only minutes away for people in Marietta, Woodstock, Acworth, Cartersville, Canton, and other nearby Cobb, Cherokee, Bartow communities.

**We offer friendly service, reasonable pricing and turnaround times**. From guitar tech work to [luthier services](https://www.artisanluthiers.com/repair/luthier-near-me.html "Explore luthier services") we will take good care of your instrument and get it back to you as quick as reasonably possible. We're a top-rated [local guitar setup](https://www.artisanluthiers.com/repair/guitar-setup.html "Local professional guitar setup") and repair shop that specializes in electric guitars, electric bass guitars, acoustic guitars, mandolins, dulcimers, and [vintage guitar restoration](https://www.artisanluthiers.com/repair/vintage-guitars-repair-restoration.html "Vintage Guitar Restoration and Repair").

##### **PROMPT TURN-AROUND & ACTIVE COMMUNICATION!** Our average lead times vary depending on workload. During our work process we can be reached via phone or text.

WANT AN APPOINTMENT?    [Contact Us Online](https://www.artisanluthiers.com/contact.html "Schedule an Appointment") or text 770-654-3223

* * *

### Full Service Repair Shop

We are a full service guitar repair shop. Our guitar tech specialists offer guitar repair services including wiring repair, soldering, nut work, fret work, and bridge repair. We can repair or replace tuning machine heads, pickups, selector switches, output jacks, control knobs, pots and caps).

We offer OEM parts, and quality aftermarket parts by top guitar parts suppliers such as Fender, Seymour-Duncan, Lace, DiMarzio, Graph Tech, Grover, CTS, and others. As luthiers we have the woodworking and electrical skills necessary for guitar work requiring wiring repair, router work, roouting cavities, filling, enlarging, sleeving holes.

### Guitar Tech Prices and Luthier Services Costs

###### We offer free estimates. Our minimum bench charge is $30.

###### Guitar tech services bench rate is $75 per hour, or billed as a flat rate cost for a defined scope-of-work.

###### Luthier services shop rate is $75 per hour, or billed as a flat rate cost for a defined scope-of-work.

### What Guitar Brands Do We Service?

Artisan Luthiers **repairs and services all brands and models** of acoustic and electric guitars and bass guitars. We can handle custom string sets, and non-standard tuning including Requinto setups.

We provide services for: Alembic, Alvarez, BC Rich, Bass Mods, Breedlove, Charvel, D'Angelico, Danelectro, Dean, Dingwall, Eastman, Epiphone, ESP, Fender, Gibson, Ibanez, Jackson, Ken Smith, Kiesel, Martin, LTD, Fernandes, G&L, Godin, Gretsch, Guild, Harley Benton, Hofner, Lakland, Marcus Miller, Michael Tobias Design, Nash, Pedulla, PRS, Rickenbacker, Sadowsky, Schecter, Spector, Squier, Suhr, Takamine, Taylor, Tobias, Wal, Warwick, Washburn, Yamaha, and other brands of stringed instruments.

Check out our [guitar projects](https://www.artisanluthiers.com/projects.html "Guitar repair, service and customizing photos.") page to see examples of what we can do for you.

## Guitar Shop Services and Prices

We do a wide variety of work on guitars, ranging from repairs, maintenance, and setups to circuit repairs, upgrades, and replacing pickups and hardware. Here is a **short list of our most requested services:**

- [Electric Guitar Setup](https://www.artisanluthiers.com/repair/guitar-setup.html "Learn about electric guitar set-up services") Inspect (and adjust if necessary) truss rod (neck relief), string action, pickup height, tuning machines, string trees, nut, bridge, saddles, output jack, control knobs, selector switches for functionality. Wipe down guitar body/fretboard/neck. (We do not attempt to clean or polish satin finishes.). Polish frets and condition (uncoated fretboard). Tune and intonate with a Peterson benchtop tuner.

Guitar Setup cost only $100 + cost of strings (Add-on charge for Floyd Rose setup) [Explore Guitar Setup](https://www.artisanluthiers.com/repair/guitar-setup.html "Learn about electric guitar set-up services")
- [Bass Guitar Setup](https://www.artisanluthiers.com/repair/bass-setup.html "Learn about bass guitar set-up services") Inspect (and adjust if necessary) truss rod (neck relief), string action, pickup height, tuning machine heads, nut, bridge, saddles, output jack, and control knobs for functionality. Wipe down bass body, fretboard, and neck. (We do not attempt to clean or polish satin finishes.). Polish frets and condition (uncoated fretboard). Install and bass guitar strings. Tune and intonate with a Peterson benchtop tuner.

Bass Setup cost only $100 + cost of strings [Explore Bass Guitar Setup](https://www.artisanluthiers.com/repair/bass-setup.html "Learn about bass guitar set-up services")
- [Acoustic Guitar Setup](https://www.artisanluthiers.com/repair/acoustic-guitar-setup.html "Learn about acoustic guitar set-up services") Inspect/adjust neck relief via truss rod (if so equipped), string action, tuning machine heads, nut, bridge, saddle, for proper functionality. Wipe down guitar body, fretboard, and neck. (We do not attempt to clean or polish satin finishes.). Polish frets and condition (uncoated fretboard). We are very proficient at being able to lower action. (We also offer Bridge Doctor installation, bridge resets, bone nuts and saddles)

Acoustic Setup cost only $100 + cost of strings [Explore Acoustic Guitar Setup](https://www.artisanluthiers.com/repair/acoustic-guitar-setup.html "Learn about acoustic guitar set-up services")
- [Guitar Jack Repair & Replacement](https://www.artisanluthiers.com/repair/output-input-jack-repair.html "Learn about guitar output jack repair") We offer guitar output jack repair and replacement. We can troubleshoot and correct problems with no sound, scratchy or static crackling, loose jacks, stripped screw holes, and related guitar output jack problems.

Prices start at $40 for labor (plus cost of jack) [Explore Guitar Jack Repair](https://www.artisanluthiers.com/repair/output-input-jack-repair.html "Learn about guitar jack repair")
- [Nut & Saddle](https://www.artisanluthiers.com/repair/guitar-nut-repair.html "Learn about guitar nut repair") We offer guitar nut and acoustic saddle replacement services. We cut, custom fit and install bone nuts. We can install metal, graphite, composite and synthetic guitar nuts. (We recommend hand cut bone nuts / saddles $90). Other nut repair services include reset loose nuts and resizing string slots to accommodate larger strings. When we replace a guitar nut we check/cut string slots to fit your preferred string sizes.

Prices start at $90 for labor (plus cost of guitar nut) [Explore Guitar Nut Repair](https://www.artisanluthiers.com/repair/guitar-nut-repair.html "Learn about guitar nut repair")
- [Guitar Tuner Repair & Replacement](https://www.artisanluthiers.com/repair/guitar-tuner-repair.html "Learn about guitar tuning machine repair and repalcement") We offer guitar tuner repair and tuning machine replacement services. We offer luthier services to enlarge, fill / re-drill tuner holes, install tuner bushings, plus fill / re-drill mounting screw holes. We can tighten loose, or replace missing, knobs and screws.

Prices start at $75 for labor (add cost of tuners, re-sizing holes, etc.). [Explore Guitar Tuner Repair & Replacement](https://www.artisanluthiers.com/repair/guitar-tuner-repair.html "Learn about guitar tuner repair")
- [Restring Guitar - 6 String Electric](https://www.artisanluthiers.com/repair/guitar-string-repair.html "Learn about electric guitar string repair") Remove and replace strings on a standard 6 string electric guitar using Ernie Ball Super Slinky 9-42 nickel wound guitar strings. Guitar will be tuned after installation of new strings. Other guitar string brands and sizes available (may affect the price). _\*Nut work for changing string sizes not included._

Guitar String Replacement starting at $40 [Explore Guitar String Repair](https://www.artisanluthiers.com/repair/guitar-string-repair.html "Learn about guitar string repair")
- [Restring Guitar - 4 String Electric Bass](https://www.artisanluthiers.com/repair/guitar-string-repair.html "Learn about bass guitar string repair") Remove and replace strings on a standard 4 string electric bass guitar using Ernie Ball Roundwound 45-105. Bass guitar will be tuned after installation of new strings. Other bass string sizes and brands available (may affect the price). _\*Nut work for changing string sizes not included._

Bass String Replacement starting at $40 [Explore Bass String Repair](https://www.artisanluthiers.com/repair/guitar-string-repair.html "Learn about bass string repair")
- [Conductive Shielding](https://www.artisanluthiers.com/repair/conductive-shielding.html "Learn about guitar conductive shielding") Professionally apply conductive shielding paint or copper shielding tape in body cavities to minimize RF electrical interference. We use copper foil shielding tape for pickguards and cover plates.

Guitar Conductive Shielding cost starts at only $75 [Explore Guitar Conductive Shielding](https://www.artisanluthiers.com/repair/conductive-shielding.html "Learn about guitar conductive shielding")
- [Fret Level, Crown & Polish (LCP)](https://www.artisanluthiers.com/repair/guitar-fret-repair.html "Learn about guitar conductive shielding") Our fret level, crown and polish service includes dressing fret ends. We can correct common problems such as high frets, rough fret ends, divots, and severely worn frets. Using specially designed luthier tools we will "level", then "crown" (round-off the top of the frets), and then use a multi-step process to "polish" (smooth out the fret wire). This service includes installing new strings.

Prices start at $225 for nickel fret wire. \*Add for stainless frets, fretboard with binding.  [Explore Guitar Fret Repair](https://www.artisanluthiers.com/repair/guitar-fret-repair.html "Learn about guitar fret repair")
- Full Refrets & Partial Refrets Remove and replace frets with your size choice of nickel fret wire. Includes level, crown, polish frets, and setup. Prices vary depending on type of guitar, binding, etc.
- Dress Fret Ends We can dress sharp fret ends, spot dress frets with high spots, and generally work on making frets smooth to improve playability. This service includes hand-polishing frets.

Prices vary depending on type of guitar, condition of frets, and overall scope-of-work.

### Guitar Repair Prices and Parts

We offer extremely competitive prices for guitar repair, maintenance and customizing. Unless otherwise specified, all prices shown on our website do not include the price for parts. We offer an extremely **wide selection of manufacturers brand name (OEM) parts and after-market parts**. We can help you select the best guitar parts for you needs and budget. We **stock circuit parts, and can special order parts** for other guitar services.

### Call us for your guitar service needs! We are confident you'll love what we do for you!

### Why People Call Artisan Luthiers

Many of our customers are referred to us. Other people first call us after doing searches such as "guitar repair near me" or similar searches for luthiers in Marietta, Kennesaw, Woodstock, Acworth, and Atlanta.

People call again because they experienced our commitment to doing **quality repair, at reasonable prices, with friendly customer service**.

## Quality Parts & Suppliers

![We use the best guitar replacement parts from OEM and top guitar parts suppliers and manufacturers.](https://www.artisanluthiers.com/images/seymour-duncan-pickup-replacement-marietta-ga.jpg)

We use quality components from 920D Custom, Seymour-Duncan, DiMarzio, EMG, Fender, Fishman, Grover, Gotoh, Hipshot, Lindy Fralin, Lollar, LR Baggs, K&K, Schaller, and others.

* * *

## Payment Options

We accept cash, checks, crypto, debit cards and credit cards. For credit card payments we accept Visa, Mastercard, Discover, and American Express.

[![We accept cash, checks, debit and credit cards VS MC AX DC](https://www.artisanluthiers.com/images/credit-cards.png)](https://www.artisanluthiers.com/support/invoice-pmt.html "We accept cash, checks, crypto, debit and credit cards VS MC AX DC")

## Guitar Setup

Premier Setup for electric 6-string guitar: $100 + cost of guitar strings.

- Inspect tuning machines, nut, bridge, saddles, jack, etc.
- Check neck relief/truss rod, string action, pickup height
- Check electronics for proper functioning: jack, pots, switches, pickups.
- Install new guitar strings and tune guitar.
- Check intonation (adjust if necessary)
- Wipe down guitar body and neck. Polish frets. Apply oil conditioner to fretboard. \*We do not attempt to clean or polish satin finishes.

[Explore Guitar Setup](https://www.artisanluthiers.com/repair/guitar-setup.html "Learn more about guitar set-up services")

## Bass Setup

Premier setup for electric 4-string or 5-string bass: $100 + cost of bass guitar strings.

- Inspect tuning machines, string guide, nut, bridge, saddles, jack, knobs.
- Check neck relief/truss rod, string action, pickup heights
- Check electronics for proper functioning: jack, pots, pickups.
- Install new bass guitar strings and tune guitar.
- Check intonation (adjust as required)
- Wipe down bass body and neck. Polish frets. Apply wood conditioner to "dark wood" fretboard. \*We do not attempt to clean or polish satin finishes.

[Explore Bass Setup](https://www.artisanluthiers.com/repair/bass-setup.html "Learn about bass guitar set-up services")

## Guitar Circuit Parts

We furnish OEM and quality aftermarket parts with complete installation services. All parts orders must be paid for in-full at time of placing order. Parts are covered by only pass-through warranties as may be available from respective manufacturers. We guarantee our labor for 30 days (not tuning of strings).

- **Pickup Installation**: Single Coil, Humbuckers \| Seymour-Duncan, Fender, EMG, Lollar, Gibson, others.
- **Output Jacks**: 1/4" 6.3mm, Mono, TRS, Stereo \| Pure Tone and Switchcraft
- **Switches**: Blade, Toggle, Blender \| Fender, CRL, Switchcraft, Emerson
- **Pots and Caps**: CTS 25k 250k 500k Pots, .100 .022 .033 .047 Orange Drop Caps, Paper-in-Oil, Poly, and some specialty capacitors.
- **Cavity Shielding**: Conductive Shielding Paint & Copper Shielding Tape
- **Wiring / Rewiring**: 22 AWG Braided Circuit Wire / Vintage Cloth Push Back Wire, Soldering (clean soldering and tidy wire routing with ties)

**Need something else?** Give us a call and learn how we can help you with other guitar electronics needs. Pricing varies depending on the parts selected.

[Request A Quote](https://www.artisanluthiers.com/contact.html "Request guitar set-up services")

## Guitar Hardware

We furnish OEM and quality aftermarket parts with complete installation services. All parts orders must be paid for in-full at time of placing order. Parts are covered by only any pass-through warranties as may be available from respective manufacturers. We guarantee our labor for 30 days.

- **Tuners**: Standard Locking Chrome Black \| Grover Gotoh Fender Gibson Hipshot
- **String Trees**: Chrome Black Gold \| GraphTech TUSQ Fender LSR Grover
- **String Nut**: Bone, Brass, Zero Glide \| Fender GraphTech TUSQ Grover
- **Bridge & Saddles**: Chrome Gold Black Roller Vintage \| Fender GraphTech Babicz Schaller
- **Control Knobs**: Ivory Black Gold Chrome Black Tophat Dome Metal \| Q-Parts, Fender, Gibson
- **Strap Buttons**: Chrome Black Locking \| Dunlop, Schaller, Grover, Waverly, Fender
- **Tremolo Systems**: Trem Blocks Springs \| Floyd Rose Callaham Fender Mastery Super-Vee BladeRunner

**Need something else?** Give us a call and learn how we can help you with other guitar hardware needs. Pricing varies depending on the parts selected.

## About Calico Guitarworks

## About  Calico Guitarworks

At Calico Guitarworks, our goal is simple: to help musicians spend less time worrying about their instruments and more time making music. In addition to being Long Island’s premier destination for fretted musical instrument repair, we design and build handcrafted electric and acoustic guitars and, through our GuitarRepairParts.com brand, provide a trusted source for parts and repair supplies worldwide.

Our team is committed to providing quick, honest, and reliable service. With more than 30 years of combined professional guitar repair experience, we bring a deep understanding of instrument care, restoration, and performance to everything we do. Built on craftsmanship, guided by experience, and grounded in exceptional service, Calico Guitarworks helps musicians get the very best from their instruments.
